title: Cores
body:
`Cores` is a library created for facilitating code reusability. While the library itself comes with some built-in functionalities, its main purpose is to serve the development of other mods.
- This mod provides a function similar to (AttributeFix) to modify the maximum, minimum and default values of various Attributes. (This feature can be turned off)
- When adding or deducting player experience in the form of levels, it will be converted to the corresponding points before taking effect (e.g. anvils, enchanting tables, etc.).

For more information, please refer to the Github source code.

Any questions can be asked in github or contacted as below:  
- [Telegram](https://url.anye.dev/tg)
- [Discord](https://url.anye.dev/discord)
